prompt: I want to create a pose in VNCCS_PoseStudio where the character is sitting on a chair resting their chin on their hand. Which bones do I adjust and how? Also what ControlNet strength should I use?

assertions.text: pelvis, thigh, calf bone values specified for sitting pose
assertions.evidence: thigh X:80, calf X:-90 in table

assertions.text: upperarm, lowerarm, hand values for chin-resting arm specified
assertions.evidence: Detailed table with all arm bones

assertions.text: ControlNet strength recommendation with specific value and reasoning
Additional tips specific to sitting pose
assertions.evidence: No chair prompt or hand warnings
